steps.title: Match the habitual tense
steps.content: The sentence describes a recurring annual migration. The earlier verb journey is present tense, and Each year in the fall signals a habitual action rather than a single past event.

steps.title: Reject past-tense forms
steps.content: A is simple past, B is past progressive, and C is past perfect; all three conflict with the present-tense, recurring context. The needed verb is simple present, matching journey and describing what monarch butterflies do each year. The answer is D.
